actions_taken: NO override changes this tick. Rationale: (i) Database-observable state shows ZERO new admissions, ZERO fills, ZERO new SELLs since the 12:00 tick — the structural risk profile is BIT-IDENTICAL to 12:00 at the database level. (ii) Of the 10 pre-armed triggers from 12:00 (A6-J6), 6 are confirmed DORMANT from database state alone; the remaining 4 (C6, D6, G6, J6) require LTP/MTM refresh which is not available this tick — but every one of them is a 'tighten on adverse drift' trigger, and no new fills means the only way they could fire is via LTP movement of EXISTING positions, which on a 30-min interval and given the 12:00 trajectory (book +1.17%, GOLDBEES drift slowing) is extraordinarily unlikely to produce a clean breach worth firing on without confirmation. (iii) Strategy cadence remains MEASURED (1 NEW BUY in 3h19m vs the Day-5 4-BUYs-in-60-min cadence that originally fired the cap stack); 7 consecutive 30-min windows with zero new admissions beyond GLENMARK. (iv) ALL guardrails binding with measurable buffer at cost basis: deployment 15.55 pp; sector caps 9.94+ pp on every cluster; position cap 2.94 pp on largest name (NESTLEIND); SL bands all clean per 12:00 telemetry. (v) Recent cumulative trajectory is RECOVERY (per 12:00: book +0.74% cumulative, 6 monotone-improving snapshots), not deterioration. (vi) Current override stack (min_confidence 0.65, max_position_pct 0.15, max_deployed_pct 0.65, default_sl_pct 0.015, min_sl_pct 0.01, max_sl_pct 0.04, daily_loss_limit_pct 0.04, max_sector_pct 0.22) was just installed at Day-6 EOD and remains correctly calibrated. Decoratively tightening on a healthy, recently-de-risked book in lunch-break low-volume hours with no firing trigger and a positive 6-tick trajectory would friction the strategy without addressing any live risk vector — same rationale as 09:00→12:00 holds. Pre-armed triggers (A7)-(J7) capture the next firing conditions for the 13:00 tick.
